approaches.title: Boundary-based layer traversal
approaches.summary: Traverses the matrix in repeated right, down, left, and up segments while tracking shrinking boundary offsets. Revision 1 is marked incorrect; revision 2 refits

revisions.shortChangeSummary: Initial boundary-offset spiral traversal; marked wrong.
Reworked the same boundary traversal to track remaining cells and improve termination handling.

approaches.title: Direction-based traversal with visited cells
approaches.summary: Walks in the current direction and rotates clockwise whenever the next cell is outside the matrix or already visited, marking visited cells in place.

revisions.shortChangeSummary: Replaced shrinking-boundary traversal with in-place visited-cell direction simulation.
